!! Stomping !!
The stomping kink involves deriving sexual pleasure or excitement from the act of being stepped on or watching someone else being stomped on, usually focusing on specific body parts like the chest, back, or even objects. This kink can intersect with elements of dominance and submission, where the person being stomped on may enjoy the feeling of being overpowered or humiliated. The intensity and specific dynamics can vary, with some emphasizing pain, while others focus on the thrill of submission or sensation.

Stomping with Sparkle

Story
Sparkle was now in her second week of pregnancy and had a routine check-up with her gynecologist to ensure everything was going well with her unborn baby. On her way out, she noticed a poster advertising a 50% discount on cosplay outfits. Since she still wanted to explore different kinks for Kinktober, an exciting idea immediately came to mind...
